visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long brown hair sits on a beige sofa, holding a grey folded cushion. She wears a white plush zip-up hoodie and dark grey pants. Her expression is energetic and expressive as she speaks directly to the camera. The background is a modern, brightly lit living room with soft overhead spotlights. (2) She presents a mint green, rounded rectangular device, which is a magnetic hand warmer. She demonstrates its functionality by splitting the magnetic halves apart with both hands. Close-up shots highlight the device's brand logo 'igrass'. Multiple text overlays and variety-style graphics appear around her. (3) The woman unfolds a large, cream-colored fleece blanket. She wraps it around her shoulders like a shawl, demonstrating its size and soft texture. The lighting is bright and even, likely studio-lit. She gestures with her hands to emphasize the blanket's features. (4) A brief cutaway shows her in an office-like setting. She has the white blanket draped over her head and shoulders while she types on a silver Mac keyboard at a glass desk. The scene suggests a cozy workplace environment. (5) She is seen lying flat on the sofa with her eyes closed, pretending to sleep peacefully while covered by the white blanket. A small Shiba Inu plush toy is placed next to her head on the couch. (6) A close-up shot shows a pair of hands plugging a black USB cable into a small black power bank, which is then tucked into a dedicated pocket inside the fleece blanket. This demonstrates the charging method of the heating element. (7) Back on the sofa, she holds the grey cushion and unrolls it to reveal its full length. She then places her bare feet into a pocket at the end of the unrolled cushion, showing its use as a foot warmer. (8) A composite green-screen shot shows the woman standing in front of a snowy background of the Forbidden City in Beijing. She is wearing the gadgets and reacting to the cold. Digital snow effects fall over the frame. (9) She returns to the indoor setting, holding the various products and smiling broadly at the camera. A final graphic with a website URL and collaboration logo appears on the screen.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long, dark brown wavy hair, wearing a white plush fleece zip-up hoodie and dark grey denim pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Primary background is a modern living room with a beige sofa, minimalist decor, and warm recessed lighting. Secondary background is a home office with a glass desk and computer setup. One scene uses a virtual background of a traditional Chinese palace in the snow.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, enthusiastic female Mandarin speech begins immediately. The background features an upbeat, driving electronic pop BGM with a steady kick drum beat. Vocal clarity is high, sounding studio-produced with low ambient noise interference. (2) A synthesized 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as a topic transition occurs. The music bed remains continuous, maintaining high energy. The speaker's delivery is rapid and persuasive, with high vocal arousal. (3) A distinct 'click' sound effect, likely mechanical or magnetic, is heard as the hand warmer is manipulated. The music maintains a constant tempo and major mode feel. (4) A high-pitched digital 'ding' sound effect accompanies the appearance of technical specifications. The speaker pauses briefly between sentences for emphasis, but the overall speech density remains high. (5) A comical 'Huh?' cartoon-style vocal sample interrupts the narration for a brief humorous moment. The BGM ducks slightly to allow the effect and the narration to stand out. (6) A short, percussive 'pop' SFX is heard as the scene cuts. Rustling sounds of soft fabric are audible as the blanket is moved. The BGM beat remains prominent. (7) A sudden burst of synthetic 'cheering' and 'applause' SFX occurs during the winter scene segment. The speaker's voice becomes even more animated, using a rising intonation pattern. (8) The video concludes with the speaker's friendly sign-off tone. The music swells slightly before a clean hard cut to silence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Showcase 1 -> Feature Showcase 2 -> Feature Showcase 3 -> Purchase CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and promote a curated set of winter warming gadgets, emphasizing their portability, heating efficiency, and ease of use to encourage viewers to purchase them through the provided link.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names brands like 'igrass', shows high-quality product demonstrations, features a '3cTim X OLi 嚴選' collaboration logo, and provides a direct purchase URL in the final frame.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical highly-produced social media short video intended for commercial conversion, using fast editing and variety-show graphics to maintain high viewer retention.
